description: Operator-facing SLO policy bundle schema and fail-closed validation contract for compiling service goals into Budget, admission, brownout, resource-pressure, and no-win fallback policy lanes.

runtime_enforcement_contract.mode: deterministic runtime SLO enforcement proof runner

lab_brownout_e2e_contract.mode: deterministic LabRuntime brownout/no-win E2E receipt runner
non_claims: not a throughput benchmark
not a broad production enforcement claim
not proof of RCH fleet availability

runtime_application_contract.mode: deterministic fail-closed runtime application of compiled policy outputs
runtime_application_contract.proof_command_rendering: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_slo_runtime_application cargo test -p asupersync --test slo_policy_bundle_contract --features test-internals runtime_slo_policy_application -- --nocapture

runtime_admission_contract.mode: explicit evidence runtime admission and brownout evaluation

gate_contract.provenance: profile_id, profile_hash, observed_profile_hash, target_commit, feature_flags, artifact_path, and related_bead_id are preserved in JSON
gate_contract.slo_objectives: latency percentiles must be positive, monotonic, supported-unit, and compatible with cleanup deadlines
gate_contract.resource_pressure: memory and fd thresholds are basis points and timer queue depth must be positive
gate_contract.fallback: every bundle must declare a no-win fallback and an rch-routed proof command
gate_contract.redaction: redaction.passed must be true and metadata/commands must not contain secret-like material
gate_contract.paths: file-backed provenance must stay repository-relative and avoid host-private path fragments
gate_contract.malformed_input: malformed bundle JSON or JSONL fails closed with malformed_json

optional_work_classes.degradation_step: batch analytics rollups until pressure clears
